name: premium-pet-visual-parity-motion
description: Verify every equipped premium pet uses the exact Creator Store template shown on its Robux stand and follows the player with damped motion instead of frame-snapping.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local a=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation a:Invoke('Reset') local names={'Crimson Phoenix','Storm Wyvern','Celestial Guardian'} local granted=0 for _,name in ipairs(names) do local r=a:Invoke('GrantPremiumPet',name) if r.ok then granted+=1 end end local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local equipped=p.RPGStats.EquippedPetsJSON.Value return H:JSONEncode({ok=granted==3 and equipped:find('Crimson Phoenix',1,true)~=nil and equipped:find('Storm Wyvern',1,true)~=nil and equipped:find('Celestial Guardian',1,true)~=nil,granted=granted,equipped=equipped})

steps.label: grant and equip all premium pets

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local folder=workspace:WaitForChild(p.Name..' Client Companions',5) local cfg=require(game.ReplicatedStorage.GameConfig) local root=workspace:WaitForChild('PunchWallRPG') local deadline=os.clock()+4 repeat task.wait(.05) until os.clock()>deadline or #folder:GetChildren()>=3 local matched,details=0,{} for _,pet in ipairs(cfg.PremiumPets) do local companion,showcase for _,m in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do if m:IsA('Model') and m:GetAttribute('PetDefinitionName')==pet.name then companion=m break end end for _,m in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do if m:IsA('Model') and m:GetAttribute('VisualRole')=='PremiumPetShowcase' and m:GetAttribute('PetDefinitionName')==pet.name then showcase=m break end end local companionParts=companion and companion:GetAttribute('VisualPartCount') or 0 local showcaseParts=showcase and showcase:GetAttribute('VisualPartCount') or -1 local same=companion and showcase and companion:GetAttribute('PetTemplate')==showcase:GetAttribute('PetTemplate') and companion:GetAttribute('PetVisualIdentity')==showcase:GetAttribute('PetVisualIdentity') and companionParts==showcaseParts and companion:GetAttribute('PremiumVisualParity')==true and companion:GetAttribute('VisualSource')~='ProceduralFallback' if same then matched+=1 end details[pet.name]={same=same,template=companion and companion:GetAttribute('PetTemplate'),source=companion and companion:GetAttribute('VisualSource'),parts=companionParts,showcaseParts=showcaseParts,asset=companion and companion:GetAttribute('SourceAssetId')} end local gui=p.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('PunchWallHUD') return H:JSONEncode({ok=matched==3 and gui:GetAttribute('PremiumPetVisualParity')==true and gui:GetAttribute('CompanionMotionSystem')=='DampedFollowV2',matched=matched,motion=gui:GetAttribute('CompanionMotionSystem'),details=details})

steps.label: equipped pets match all three showcase models

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local root=p.Character and p.Character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') local folder=workspace:FindFirstChild(p.Name..' Client Companions') local pet for _,m in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do if m:IsA('Model') and m:GetAttribute('PetDefinitionName')=='Celestial Guardian' then pet=m break end end task.wait(.2) local before=pet:GetBoundingBox().Position root.Anchored=true root.CFrame=root.CFrame+root.CFrame.RightVector*10 task.wait() local early=pet:GetBoundingBox().Position task.wait(.75) local late=pet:GetBoundingBox().Position root.Anchored=false local earlyMove=(early-before).Magnitude local lateMove=(late-before).Magnitude return H:JSONEncode({ok=pet:GetAttribute('SmoothFollowReady')==true and pet:GetAttribute('MotionSystem')=='DampedFollowV2' and earlyMove>0.05 and earlyMove<8.5 and lateMove>earlyMove+1 and lateMove<13,earlyMove=earlyMove,lateMove=lateMove,ready=pet:GetAttribute('SmoothFollowReady'),motion=pet:GetAttribute('MotionSystem')})

steps.label: premium pet follows with visible interpolation
